data.title: iQIYI to Open Its First Central China Theme Park in Wuhan, Continuing to Bring IP Value Beyond the Screen
data.description: In a recent announcement on March 28, 2026, iQIYI, a prominent online entertainment platform in China, revealed its intentions to establish iQIYI LAND in Wuhan, situated in Central China's Hubei province. The forthcoming park will be located within the Hanyangzao Cultural and Creative Industry Park and marks the company's inaugural project within the region.
According to Taiwan TV stations, Taiwan opposition leader said in meeting with Xi that cooperation is needed to build a modern China
10-year Indian government bond yield at 6.9610%, little changed from 6.9601% previously

data.title: ADP Jobs, ISM Services Data Will Keep Fed On Hold; S&P 500 Steady
data.description: Employment numbers have shown little change in the last two months, with most gains being observed in the service sector. Following the release of the ADP Jobs Report and ISM Services Data, the Federal Reserve is expected to maintain its current stance. The S&P 500 index remains stable amidst this economic data.

data.title: 4.3% GDP Growth Overstated By Odd Video Game Inflation Data
data.description: Surprising inflation data related to historic video games has contributed to the overstatement of the GDP growth by 4.3%.

data.title: CPI Inflation Turns Cold, Though Data Has Issues; S&P 500 Rallies
data.description: Stocks have not capitalized on the Federal Reserve's more cautious stance. Following a decrease in Consumer Price Index inflation, despite data inconsistencies, the S&P 500 experienced a surge.

data.title: Jobs Report: Unemployment Jumps But Fed Cut Will Wait; S&P 500 Slips
data.description: In November, the United States saw an increase of 64,000 jobs, however, the unemployment rate also rose to 4.6% following the end of the government shutdown. Despite this, the Federal Reserve is expected to hold off on cutting rates. The S&P 500 experienced a slip following the release of the Jobs Report.

data.title: Fed Cuts Key Rate To Stem Job Losses; S&P 500 Rises
data.description: The Federal Reserve has reduced its primary interest rate in an effort to combat job losses. However, the S&P 500 index is currently responding to forecasts for the year 2026 and statements made by Chair Jerome Powell during a recent news conference. This move by the Fed aims to stimulate economic growth and stabilize the job market. In the aftermath of the rate cut, the S&P 500 has seen an increase in value.

data.title: Fed Meeting: Job Openings Jump, But Don't Worry About Hawkish Shift
data.description: Recently released Federal Reserve projections indicate the possibility of only one interest rate cut in the year 2026. It is crucial to consider the surrounding circumstances when analyzing this information. Following the Federal Reserve meeting, there was a notable increase in job openings. Despite this, there is no need to be concerned about a hawkish shift in policy. This update was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Key Fed Inflation Rate Makes Rate Cut A Lock; S&P 500 Rallies
data.description: Inflation rates are currently lower than the Federal Reserve's projections. As a result, the possibility of a rate cut is almost certain. Following this news, the S&P 500 experienced a rally.

data.title: ADP Jobs Report Shows Surprise Drop In Private Payrolls; S&P 500 Wavers
data.description: The BLS jobs report is pending until after the Fed meeting, but the recent ADP Jobs Report revealed an unexpected decrease in private payrolls. This news caused fluctuations in the S&P 500 index. Stay tuned for the official figures from the BLS.
